1.title: jfrog.enterprise.artifact.stats
1.query:
timeseries stats = avg(jfrog.enterprise.artifact.stats),
  by: { dt.entity.custom_device }
| fieldsAdd custom_device_name = entityName(dt.entity.custom_device)
| sort arrayAvg(stats) desc
| limit 20
